content:
# Thermal Flooding

**Summary**: A method of enhancing oil recovery by injecting hot fluids into the reservoir.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] investigated thermal-flooding using both Boussinesq and memory-based models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Thermal flooding is a key method for improving recovery in heavy oil reservoirs.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Simulated via non-isothermal flow equations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The modified Boussinesq model is valid for temperature differences up to 75 K. ([[2016-david|DAVID, 2016, p. 97]])
- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Not stated in source.
